name: Greater Cannabis Company, Inc.
summary: PART I HISTORY OF OUR COMPANY The Greater Cannabis Company, Inc. (the Company) was formed in March 2014 as a limited liability company under the name, The Greater Cannabis Company, LLC. The Company was a wholly owned subsidiary of Sylios Corp (Sylios) until March 10, 2017. On July 31, 2018, the Company acquired 100% of the issued and outstanding shares of Class A common stock of Green C Corporation (Green C) in exchange for 9,411,998 newly issued shares of the Companys Series A Convertible Prefe...
